architecture.summary: Pure frontend change in single page.tsx file. Cancel button serves as undo. No API changes needed.

integrations.summary: N/A - uses existing commit API endpoint, no new integrations

ui-ux.summary: Delete All in toolbar (edit mode only), reuse modal for confirmation. Per-case delete with no confirmation. Empty state shows No eval cases message.

performance.summary: N/A - trivial client-side array operations, no performance concerns

security.summary: N/A - admin-only page, existing auth, no new endpoints

edge-cases.summary: Empty array commit allowed. IDs not renumbered after deletion. Cancel reverts all changes.
